name: bible-scholar-ai
description: Bible Scholar AI Enterprise - Advanced Biblical Study Platform

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/backend && npm run lint -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w packages/backend && npm run typecheck -w packages/frontend
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
